meta.description: Defines a data pipeline as an ordered sequence of functions, each consuming the previous step's output

skills.claude: A Pipeline is a template — it defines the shape of a run but does not execute. 'inputType' is either a Kanecta type UUID or a TypeScript primitive string. Each step declares the Function UUID to call and the Kanecta type UUID of the object it produces. The output of step N becomes the input of step N+1. To execute a pipeline, create a Pipeline Run item.

sqlSchema:
CREATE TABLE "obj_c0d6b3de_a652_435c_a9e9_2339de1211f6" (
    item_id UUID NOT NULL,
    "name" TEXT,
    "description" TEXT,
    "input_type" TEXT,
    CONSTRAINT "pk_obj_c0d6b3de_a652_435c_a9e9_2339de1211f6" PRIMARY KEY (item_id),
    CONSTRAINT "fk_c0d6b3dea652435c_item" FOREIGN KEY (item_id) REFERENCES items(id)
)
